headline: Why Motorola Solutions (MSI) Is Up 6.6% After Expanding AI-Driven 911 Translation And Streaming Tools
summary: Motorola Solutions recently expanded its Assist AI agents for 911 workflows, adding real-time call translation and live audio streaming integrated into its CAD and mobile platforms so first responders can access multilingual, transcribed call intelligence directly in the field. By pairing automated language detection with live audio and keyword highlights pushed simultaneously to real-time operations centers, Motorola Solutions is deepening its role in how public safety agencies coordinate...
